The '''''Onslaught''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the ''Onslaught'' was dispatched to [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Alecs Brellar]] to bring the system into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
